title: Doflamingo Hunts the Ope Ope Fruit
description: Pages 16–20 focus on doflamingo hunts the ope ope fruit, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Sai, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as rosinante reveals his true nature and chooses to save Law from Doflamingo, even as the Donquixote Family closes in.

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: Was what you said back there true!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The secret name "D," if that really is your name,

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Then leave immediately. Get far away from doffy.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You of all people must not be anywhere near Doflamingo!

summary: Doflamingo Hunts the Ope Ope Fruit advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Sai, Unknown person #3, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
